language: swift
exerciseType: 1

# --instructions--

Définissez `amount` à la valeur `"50 dollars"`

# --before-seed--

```swift
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE
import Foundation

var _testCount = 0
var _testFailedCount = 0
func tryCatch(_ assertion: Bool) {
    _testCount += 1
    if !assertion {
        _testFailedCount += 1
        print("Test Case '--err-t\(_testCount)--' failed")
    }
}
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --seed--

```swift
var amount = "20 dollars"
// write after this line
```

# --asserts--

`amount` doit être égal à `"50 dollars"`

```swift
tryCatch(amount == "50 dollars")
```

# --after-asserts--

```swift
print("Executed \(_testCount) tests, with \(_testFailedCount) failures")
```
# --solutions--

```swift
var amount = "20 dollars"
amount = "50 dollars"
```
